prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8597 名、2026年计划小幅扩招（+7.4%）、甘肃省考生总数大幅增长（+21.5%）、学校软科排名持续上升（56→51）及工科专业热度偏高等因素，扩招对位次的推后效应被考生大增和学 校吸引力增强部分抵消，预计2026年最低录取位次在8597名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约8996名，区间8496–9496名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 science/physics category minimum rankings approximately 5298→6083→13964→8820→8597. In 2023, due to a significant drop in the provincial control line, rankings showed an abnormal backward shift. After the 2024 new college entrance examination reform, rankings rebounded to 8820, and further improved to 8597 in 2025. The trend over the past two years has been moving forward, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 8597. Provincial science/physics category enrollment plans: 2021: 58 → 2022: 61 → 2023: 61 → 2024: 66 → 2025: 68, with a gradual small expansion each year. The 2026 plan is 73, an increase of 5 (+7.4%) compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that provides some but limited relief to competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class construction university. Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to applicants. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 places), but this was an individual major phenomenon. The 2026 reputation file does not include this university, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity total ranking 21/106, rated as 'relatively hot', with medium-to-high short video exposure. Special content such as Antarctic seawater included with admission letters has attracted attention, leading to a moderate increase in application interest. Historical admission anomalies only occurred in 2023 with low attention (minor language majors), with no significant overall gap records. Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, totaling 4 A- and above disciplines. Marine Science and Aquaculture are nationally top-tier, highly aligned with the university's marine characteristics, providing stable appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, and other engineering majors offered by this university continue to have high social popularity. Marine science, aquaculture, and other characteristic majors maintain stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Gansu Province is approximately 218,700, an increase of about 21.5% compared to 2025 (approximately 179,817), significantly intensifying competition. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, with enrollment in Gansu accounting for about 0.9%–1.1% (2024: 7 students in Gansu / 759 nationwide), making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local preference advantages. Qingdao, as a coastal city, has some regional appeal to students from the northwest.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8597, a modest enrollment expansion in 2026 (+7.4%), a significant increase in the total number of Gansu examinees (+21.5%), the university's continuous rise in Soft Science rankings (56→51), and high popularity of engineering majors, the backward effect of expansion on rankings is partially offset by the surge in applicants and increased university appeal. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward from 8597. Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 8996, with a range of 8496–9496.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Marine Science (with Basic Disciplines Top Talent Plan 2.0 Base)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Cyberspace Security, Software Engineering, Confidential Technology)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Marine Technology
- Automation
- Accounting (with International Certified Public Accountant ACCA Direction Class)
- Finance (with Chartered Financial Analyst CFA Experimental Class)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Food Science and Engineering (Food Science and Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health)
- Biological Sciences (Ecology, Biotechnology, Biological Science)
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices)
- Civil Engineering
- Marketing (Digital Intelligence Marketing Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8496–9496, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Marine Technology, Automation, Accounting, Finance, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Marine Science, Computer Science, Electronic Information) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Food Science and Engineering, Biological Sciences, etc.) as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<8496), prioritize sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper bound (>9496), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 829 → 848 → 900 → 852 → 1196. From 2021 to 2024, the ranking was basically stable between 829 and 900, but in 2025 it significantly shifted back to 1196 (a backward shift of 344 places compared to 2024), showing large fluctuations in the recent year. The baseline for 2025 is about 1196. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 21 in 2021 → 21 in 2022 → 19 in 2023 → 18 in 2024 → 18 in 2025, showing a slight reduction trend. In 2026, the plan is 27, a significant increase of 9 (+50%) compared to 2025, which notably alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, reflecting steady improvement in overall strength. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 places), but this was an isolated phenomenon for specific majors. In 2026, the reputation file did not include this university, with no obvious negative public opinion. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranking is 21/106, rated as 'relatively hot', with moderate to high short video exposure and a moderately rising application attention. Historical admission anomalies only occurred in 2023 with low attention (minor language majors), with no obvious gaps overall. It has A+ in Aquaculture, A+ in Marine Science, A- in Biology, and A- in Food Science and Engineering. However, the liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, etc.) have low correlation with these advantageous disciplines, so the direct boosting effect of discipline evaluations on liberal arts major applications is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Journalism and Communication have moderate to differentiated social popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Gansu Province is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.5% compared to 2025 (about 179,817), representing a significant increase in examinee scale. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, with an enrollment share in Gansu Province of about 0.9%–1.1%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local advantage. As a coastal city, Qingdao has some regional appeal to northwestern examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1196, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+50%), the large increase in Gansu examinees (+21.5%), the rising Soft Science ranking, and the differentiation in liberal arts major popularity, the 50% expansion has a notable effect of pushing the ranking backward. Although the increase in examinees partially offsets this, overall competitive pressure is significantly reduced. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift backward notably from 1196. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1525, with a range of 1144–1906.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Law (with Ministry of Education's Foreign-related Legal Talent Collaborative Training Innovation Base (Cultivation))
- Chinese Language and Literature.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Financial Management
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Network and New Media)
- English
- Administrative Management (eligible for selection into Global Environmental Governance Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Political Science and Administration
- Business Administration (Digital Innovation Management)
- Public Administration
- Marketing (Digital Intelligence Marketing Management)
- Tourism Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1144–1906, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Financial Management, English, Administrative Management, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Political Science and Administration, Business Administration, Public Administration, etc.) as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1144), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>1906), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
